settings.recap-editor-hint: Opens an editor to manage the recap text sections.
settings.recap-slidems-hint: The duration each recap slide is displayed (e.g., 6000).
settings.recap-pausems-hint: How long to wait before the recap starts over (e.g., 10000).
settings.fade-in-hint: The time in milliseconds for a vision to fully fade in.
settings.fade-out-hint: The time in milliseconds for a vision to disappear.
settings.path-hint: Path to the image to be displayed
settings.recap-hint: Divide sections using empty lines. Line breaks within a section are preserved.

recap.no_sections: [{name}] No recap sections defined (World Setting: recapSections)

sidebar.title: Fade in images
sidebar.delete-text: Really remove image from the list?
